details: Webrix-docs is a typosquat of the legitimate webix-docs documentation package. The package has no repository, no description, and a high version number (19.2.11) on its first and only publication. It installs a preinstall hook that runs node index.js on install, automatically executing the package's main entry point without the installer's knowledge or consent. The package was published under a name that differs from the real webix-docs by one character (webrix vs webix), intended to catch typo-prone installs and run code on the victim's machine during npm install.
